caption: The video concludes with a clean, minimalist closing screen. Initially, the screen displays a message in light blue text on a white background that reads, "For more information, please visit www.st.com," inviting viewers to explore further details on the mentioned website. The text is centered and occupies the upper portion of the screen, while a thin blue line runs horizontally across the bottom. Below this line, smaller text states, "All rights reserved © STMicroelectronics 2015," indicating the copyright information. As the video progresses, the screen transitions to a completely white frame, suggesting the end of the content or a transition to another segment. The overall design is simple and professional, emphasizing clarity and directing the viewer's attention to the provided website for additional information.
